title: Op Permission
description:
Op Permission Mod
A mod that allows you to get OP in survival Minecraft
body:
## Op Permission Mod

### Op Permission Mod allows you to get OP in Survival Minecraft

**What does this mod do?**

Once you beat the ender dragon, your permission level will get updated from 0 to 2 (access to all commands except the server management commands)

**How can I get OP?**

Using the new version:

You will need to beat the ender dragon (get the Free The End advancement)

Using the old version, you need to craft the Op Permission item, its recipe is:

<details>
<summary>Op Permission Item Recipe</summary>

- Enchanted Golden Apple x1
- Golden Apple x1
- End Crystal x1
- Dragon Egg x1
- Totem of Undying x1
- Obsidian x1
- Conduit x1
- Elytra x1
- Beacon x1

</details>

**Why would I need this mod?**

If you want to play survival at first then after you beat the game you can use cheats to help you build things easier

**The deopme command**

This command will make you deop yourself in case you don't want OP

**Notes:**

1. The new version is a rewritten version from the first version
2. The first version is not supported and is not recemmended to use it
3. Forge and NeoForge comming soon
4. The mod currently supports 1.21.8, but there are plans to add 1.21.1 and 1.20.1
5. If you want any other version than the supported versions, please submit a request on GitHub
6. The new versions currently support multiplayer only, support for singleplayer comming soon

Made By : juliankh6142
